description: Add address constants for SN-S tone block (Common at offset 00 00 00, Partial 1-3, MFX). SN-S has: Common (ring, wave shape, unison, portamento, tone level, 14 params), per-partial OSC (waveform, pitch, PW, detune, 8 params), Filter (type, cutoff, reso, env, key follow, 12 params), Amp (level, vel, env, 8 params), LFO (shape, rate, fade, delay, pitch/filter/amp depth, 10 params), Mod LFO (9 params), Aftertouch (2 params), Misc (6 params). Add SnSynthState, SnSynthPartialState structs.
title: Core: SN-S address map and state types
